title: Compensation by judicial declaration
doc_html:
Art. 1902.  Compensation by judicial declaration

Although the obligation claimed in compensation is unliquidated, the court can declare compensation as to that part of the obligation that is susceptible of prompt and easy liquidation.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
